title: Lesson 201: 弾く, 弾く, 低い...

items.gloss: to flip; to snap; to flick; to repel; to use (an abacus); to calculate; to strum; to pluck the strings (of a guitar, etc.)
to play (a stringed or keyboard instrument)
low (rank, degree, value, content, quality, etc.); low (position); close to the ground; short (height); deep (voice); in a low key; low (volume)
left (esp. in vertical Japanese writing); the following
-ian (e.g. Italian); -ite (e.g. Tokyoite); -er (e.g. performer, etc.); person working with ...; man; person; people
